name: Маска Свечи
notes: The Candle's Mask of the Defense of the First Adit: the lamp-warden who lit the tunnel and burned the raiders' ladders. The current bearer is a human alchemist from Kragmir's academy quarter, name never announced. She covers the ramps with fire flasks, blinding flash charges, and walls of smoke, snaps a charge in the face of anyone who closes, and slips away before the answer lands. Her mask carries smoked-glass lenses, so her own light never blinds her. Glass cannon: high Reflex, thin HP.

strikes.name: magnesium flash
strikes.text: On a hit, the target attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1 minute, and on a critical failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] for 1 round instead. Spends one Magnesium Flash.

actions.name: Quick Bomber
actions.text: Маска Свечи Interacts to draw a bomb, then Strikes with it.

actions.name: Smoke Veil
actions.text: Маска Свечи throws a smoke ball up to 10 feet. Smoke fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] for 1 minute, and creatures inside it are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed]. Spends one Smoke Ball (Greater).

actions.name: Flash in the Face
actions.text:
Trigger A creature moves into a square adjacent to Маска Свечи.

Effect She snaps a charge open at arm's length. The triggering creature attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1 round, and on a critical failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] for 1 round instead. Spends one Magnesium Flash.

actions.name: Lensed Mask
actions.text: The smoked glass in the mask's eyes is ground for exactly this work. Маска Свечи is immune to the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] conditions from her own alchemical light, and gains a +2 circumstance bonus to saves against visual effects.

actions.name: Mobility
actions.text: She never stands where she threw from. When Маска Свечи Strides half her Speed or less, that movement does not trigger reactions.

description.value:
Activate 1 Strike

A lamp-warden's magnesium charge, thrown up to 20 feet. It deals @Damage[(1d6)[fire]] damage and 1 fire splash damage. On a hit, the target attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1 minute, and on a critical failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] for 1 round instead.
